policy.P0: Silent failure, security risk, retry-policy breach, or blocks other refactors
policy.P1: Observability + lifecycle correctness; hides type errors; architectural rework
policy.P2: Style, structure, typing hygiene, mechanical prune

items.title: innerHTML sinks with untrusted values (187 sites)
items.fix: Route through escapeHtml + typed template builder; ban raw .innerHTML via ESLint no-restricted-syntax except types/**

items.title: new Function() dynamic eval (1 site)
items.fix: Replace with explicit dispatch table

items.title: Silent IndexedDB catch in prompt-dropdown.ts:157
items.fix: Log via Logger.error() with Reason+ReasonDetail; surface to overlay

items.title: 4 unauthorized console.error sites + 5 unannotated silent catches
items.fix: Replace with logError; annotate legitimate silent catches with // reason: ...

items.title: 10 setInterval sites bypass trackedSetInterval registry
items.fix: Migrate to trackedSetInterval; add pagehide unwind

items.title: Auth-critical raw localStorage keys
items.fix: Add to StorageKey enum in types/storage-keys.ts

items.title: 3 packages at 0.00 test ratio
items.rationale: 59 prod files uncovered; marco-sdk hosts auth surface
items.fix: Ship tests for getBearerToken(), dom-utils, xpath core; enforce via CI check-test-with-features.mjs

items.title: ESLint disables complexity rules for standalone-scripts/**
items.rationale: max-lines-per-function and sonarjs/cognitive-complexity silenced; hides all hotspots
items.fix: Re-enable with per-folder caps (ui max: 80, db/core max: 60, sdk/common max: 50)

items.title: MacroController god-module — 18 cycle chains
items.rationale: Fan-out through ui/ui-updaters -> loop-engine -> credit-balance loops back through api-namespace
items.fix: Extract core/controller-state.ts value module; leaves import state, not controller

items.title: 95 'as unknown as' double casts hide type errors
items.rationale: Each site is a missing declaration masqueraded as a cast; violates mem://standards/unknown-usage-policy
items.fix: Per-site: extend target type OR add runtime guard; then ban via no-restricted-syntax outside types/**

items.title: 815 hex + ~200 rgb(a) literals bypass semantic tokens
items.rationale: Bypasses dark-only theme; missing tokens for status ramps and surfaces
items.fix: Add missing tokens; migrate literals; ban via stylelint or no-restricted-syntax

items.title: 7 MutationObservers missing pagehide unwind
items.fix: Add pagehide handler in each observer owner

items.title: addEventListener vs removeEventListener parity 143:48
items.fix: Introduce trackedAddEventListener with AbortController-per-scope pattern

items.title: 13 remaining raw localStorage literals in 7 files
items.fix: Migrate to StorageKey enum; add ESLint no-restricted-syntax guard

items.title: 3 files > 1000 LOC ceiling
items.fix: Split by domain; enforce soft 800 / hard 1200 via check-file-loc-ceiling.mjs

items.title: logging.ts leaf inversion (10 chains)
items.rationale: logger imports CSV export -> credit -> auth -> interval-registry -> logger
items.fix: logging.ts becomes a leaf; log-csv-export imports logging (not vice-versa)

items.title: db/macro-db <-> seed/seed-plan-next (11 chains)
items.fix: Move seedPlanNextPrompts() invocation to a bootstrap module that imports both

items.title: 33 legacy auth/credit/rename unused exports
items.fix: Per-symbol ripgrep triage; delete or reconnect

items.title: Class A API response parsing (~80 unknown occurrences)
items.fix: Introduce parse<Schema>() helpers per API; throw ApiParseError on mismatch

items.title: Class B namespace bags (~82 unknown occurrences)
items.fix: Promote Record<string, unknown> bags into named interfaces in project-namespace-shape.d.ts

items.title: repeat-loop-presets values not asserted (session regression)
items.rationale: Values 10,12,15,20,60,75,80,100,200 shipped v4.74.0 without value-set assertion
items.fix: Add locked value-set assertion; enforce via check-test-with-features.mjs

items.title: 261 unknown annotations to audit for legitimacy
items.fix: Annotate each with // reason: catch|input|opaque-json OR replace

items.title: Banned identifier msg used in flagged files
items.fix: Rename to message; add ESLint id-denylist

items.title: PascalCase files in core/
items.fix: Rename to macro-controller.ts (coordinated with P0-09 refactor)

items.title: 13 pairwise cycles (mechanical extraction)
items.fix: Extract shared type/state into a third leaf module per pair

items.title: P0 barrel re-export drift (116 items)
items.rationale: Note: audit calls this P0 within its own scope; classified P2 in consolidated backlog because prune is mechanical and low-risk once P0-09/P1-06/P1-07 land
items.fix: Delete export * barrels; consumers import from source

items.title: Class D/E storage + DOM coercion (~69 unknown occurrences)
items.fix: Typed storage accessors keyed by StorageKey; dataset-typed.ts helper
